slider.headline: Elopements + micro weddings
slider.text: For couples planning an intimate, intentional adventure free from expectations. Because big weddings aren't for everyone.

slider.headline: (Destination) weddings
slider.text: Local and destination wedding photography for couples who'd rather create and unforgettable experience than go the traditional route.

slider.headline: Adventure sessions
slider.text: For the couples who’d rather hike up a mountain than pose by a white wall. For those who want a cool experience worth reliving, not just a few nice pictures. Perfect for engagement photos, an epic date night or a surprise proposal.
